parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Enable or disable the MIDI Out .

parameters.name: destination
parameters.label: MIDI Destination
parameters.description: Where the MIDI events are sent to. MIDI Mapper is the default destination.

parameters.name: device
parameters.label: Device Table
parameters.description: to the MIDI device .

parameters.name: id
parameters.label: Device ID
parameters.description: Specify the id of which device to use.

parameters.name: onebased
parameters.label: One Based Index
parameters.description: Make the index 1 based instead of the default 0 based.

parameters.name: file
parameters.label: MIDI File
parameters.description: The filename of the output MIDI file.

parameters.name: writefile
parameters.label: Write MIDI File
parameters.description: Writes all the data to a MIDI file.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.label: Channel Prefix
parameters.description: The prefix string that all input channels must have in order to extract the channel number from their name (i.e. "ch1note44", with a channel prefix of "ch").

parameters.name: cookalways
parameters.label: Cook Every Frame
parameters.description: Forces a cook of the every frame. It should be On because the MIDI Out will otherwise only cook if the leads to a graphics display viewer. You want it to cooks whether you are displaying anything or n

parameters.name: autonoteoff
parameters.label: Automatic Note Off
parameters.description: A MIDI 'All Note Off' event can be sent upon the start and/or end of the output.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: All Notes Off
parameters.description: Sends an All Notes Off message to all MIDI channels.

parameters.name: volumeoff
parameters.label: All Volume Off
parameters.description: Sends an All Notes Off message to all MIDI channels.

parameters.name: volumeon
parameters.label: All Volume On
parameters.description: Sends an All Notes On message to all MIDI channels.

parameters.name: startstop
parameters.label: Send Start/Stop/Continue Events
parameters.description: Sends the appropriate events when the framebar starts or stops.

parameters.name: sendmtc
parameters.label: Send MIDI Timecode
parameters.description: While enabled, the MIDI Out will send MIDI Timecode (MTC) as a stream of quarter frame messages.

parameters.name: timecodeop
parameters.label: Timecode Object/CHOP/DAT
parameters.description: The MIDI Timecode value to send. Should be a reference to either a with channels 'hour', 'second', 'minute', 'frame', a with a timecode string in its first cell, or a object.

parameters.name: notename
parameters.label: Note Name
parameters.description: The base name of the note channels. If input channels have a number after the name, it is assumed to be the note number. If not, the channel value is assumed to contain the note number.

parameters.name: aftername
parameters.label: Aftertouch Name
parameters.description: The name of the aftertouch channel.

parameters.name: pressname
parameters.label: Pressure Name
parameters.description: The name of the channel pressure channel.

parameters.name: notenorm
parameters.label: Normalize
parameters.description: Values in the range 0-1 are mapped to MIDI value 0-127.

parameters.name: pitchname
parameters.label: Pitch Wheel Name
parameters.description: The name of the pitch wheel channel.

parameters.name: controlname
parameters.label: Controller Name
parameters.description: The base name of the controller channels.

parameters.name: controlformat
parameters.label: Controller Format
parameters.description: Sends 7 or 14 bit controller events.

parameters.name: controlnorm
parameters.label: Normalize
parameters.description: Maps channel values from different ranges to 0-127.

parameters.name: progname
parameters.label: Program Change
parameters.description: The name of the program change channel.

parameters.name: barname
parameters.label: Bar Ramp Name
parameters.description: Clock ticks frequency is determined by the period of the ramp. The ramp must be 0 to 1. An incoming channel name for a 0 to 1 ramp over each 4-beat bar.

parameters.name: barticks
parameters.label: Ticks per Bar
parameters.description: Default is 96 = 4 beats * 24 ticks per beat.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
